{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Forged swords
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] slashed at a [[Forged sword]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
